title: yosys master fails to build
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

My nightly yosys arch package builder just failed.

Build instructions can be found here: https://github.com/FFY00/symbiflow-arch-pkgs/blob/master/yosys-git/PKGBUILD

## Actual behavior

```
/usr/bin/ld: src/base/abci/abc.o: in function `Abc_CommandTest':
/build/yosys-git/src/yosys/abc/src/base/abci/abc.c:13899: undefined reference to `Gia_EnumPerms'
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
make[1]: *** [Makefile:216: abc-default] Error 1
make: *** [Makefile:714: abc/abc-default] Error 2
```

Workflow run: https://github.com/FFY00/symbiflow-arch-pkgs/runs/648044973
code_blocks:
/usr/bin/ld: src/base/abci/abc.o: in function `Abc_CommandTest':
/build/yosys-git/src/yosys/abc/src/base/abci/abc.c:13899: undefined reference to `Gia_EnumPerms'
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
make[1]: *** [Makefile:216: abc-default] Error 1
make: *** [Makefile:714: abc/abc-default] Error 2
